name: Fruit Conflict
short_description: Start the adventure and escape from the monsters, upgrade unique skins, abilities, profile icons, or you can collect crystal and gold and enjoy the unique world of the game!
detailed_description:
Start the adventure and escape from the monsters, upgrade unique skins, abilities, profile icons, or you can collect crystal and gold and enjoy the unique world of the game!

Features


● 6 worlds
● 2 ability
● 40+ levels
● 15+ skins
● 6+ profile icons
● Upgrade system
● Fruit Arena gamemode
● Survival gamemode
● Custom music,sound
● 20+ quests
● Gold and Crystal
● 12+ monsters
● Custom maps
● Crazy levels
● Menu colors
